name: Air Lift
explanation: An air-band shelving EQ: the silky high-shelf specialist. A gentle, wide AIR high shelf opens and brightens the very top without harshness, with a selectable corner that climbs up into the highs (2.5k / 5k / 10k / 20k / 40k). Beneath it sit a musical LOW shelf and a broad MID bell, plus an OUTPUT trim. All bands are clean, stable biquads — boost-only air with a soft slope so the top lifts instead of spiking. Controls: Air, Air Freq, Low, Mid and Output.
